blended.narrative: Copper Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.5 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 8,495 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.5" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 5" over the past week. Current depth: 30".
